data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Opt-in/opt-out management' requirement, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this feature. The absence of API reads or persisted state checks related to opt-in/opt-out management indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or functionality for opt-in/opt-out management.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
